params_used.custom_text: // This module handles up to 4 interrupt requests. It has inputs for each request (irq0, irq1, irq2, irq3) and a clock signal. Upon rising edge of the clock, it checks the status of the interrupts. If an interrupt is active, it sets the corresponding output (ack0, ack1, ack2, ack3) low and clears the interrupt request after acknowledging it. Only one interrupt can be handled at a time, with priority given to irq3, followed by irq2, irq1, and irq0.
